name: Promo Code Disappears at Payment
description: Apply a promo code during cart review, then proceed to payment. The promo code discount disappears due to a state key mismatch between cart and payment contexts.

steps.name: Add item to cart
steps.nova_act_prompt: Go to the product page for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and click 'Add to Cart'

steps.name: Apply promo code
steps.nova_act_prompt: Type 'SAVE20' into the promo code field and click 'Apply'

steps.name: Proceed to checkout
steps.expected: Checkout page loads with discount still applied

steps.name: Fill shipping address
steps.nova_act_prompt: Fill shipping: Jane Smith, 456 Oak Ave, Portland, OR 97201

steps.name: Verify discount on review
steps.nova_act_prompt: Check that the order summary still shows the SAVE20 promo discount

seeded_bugs.name: Promo code state key mismatch
seeded_bugs.description: Cart stores discount under 'promoCode' but payment reads from 'couponCode', causing the discount to silently drop
